text.title: Resource Management Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the resource-management methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and a decision-gate that maps to a rule.

step.name: plan_to_70pct
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Planned utilisation must cap at 70% per person; 100% planning leaves zero slack and guarantees slippage.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `plan-to-70pct` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: skill_match_required
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Each task must list required skills; assignment to person without skill flagged as gap.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `skill-match-required` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: critical_path_aware
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Resource levelling must start from critical-path tasks; non-critical can be deferred without schedule impact.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `critical-path-aware` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: weekly_actuals
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Actuals (hours logged) must be compared to plan weekly; >20% delta triggers replan.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `weekly-actuals` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: roster_source_of_truth
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Roster must live in git (or equivalent versioned store), not in PM head; loss of PM = loss of plan otherwise.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `roster-source-of-truth` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: validate_and_record
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-resource-management.py --file artefact.json`. Record output under `## Status` in the artefact.
step.output: Exit 0 = artefact accepted; exit 1 = violations listed; exit 2 = usage error.
step.decision-gate: Validator MUST return 0 before downstream consumption.
